suite.name: Tests
suite.source: D:\MISSI\💀 Segundo Cuatrimestre 💀\Trabajo Fin de Máster\Desarrollo\CliniCore_Tests\tests

kw.name: Obtener Token De Autenticacion
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '59', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin.rf@clinicore.qa", "password": "Admin123!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Realiza POST /auth/login y devuelve el access_token JWT. NestJS @Post sin @HttpCode devuelve 201 por defecto.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Crear Headers Con Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Devuelve dict de headers con Authorization Bearer.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=gateway, url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOjU2LCJlbWFpbCI6ImFkbWluLnJmQGNsaW5pY29yZS5xYSIsIm5vbWJyZXMiOiJBZG1pbiBSb2JvdCBGcmFtZXdvcmsiLCJyb2xJZCI6MSwic3VjdXJzYWxJZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzgxOTkxOTkxLCJleHAiOjE3ODE5OTI4OTF9.dvhuIeZik3UZIchXS96LLRGu7tqVUnCXozkEo5TybZA'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

suite.name: TC Auth

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=gateway_pub, url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC-AUTH-001: Health Check Del API Gateway

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/health path_url=/api/v1/health headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: El endpoint /health debe responder 200 sin autenticación.

test.name: TC-AUTH-002: Login Exitoso Con Credenciales Validas

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '59', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin.rf@clinicore.qa", "password": "Admin123!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: El administrador se autentica y recibe un access_token no vacío.

test.name: TC-AUTH-008: Token Valido Permite Acceso A Ruta Protegida

kw.name: Obtener Token De Autenticacion
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '59', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin.rf@clinicore.qa", "password": "Admin123!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Realiza POST /auth/login y devuelve el access_token JWT. NestJS @Post sin @HttpCode devuelve 201 por defecto.

kw.name: Crear Headers Con Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Devuelve dict de headers con Authorization Bearer.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/pacientes path_url=/api/v1/pacientes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOjU2LCJlbWFpbCI6ImFkbWluLnJmQGNsaW5pY29yZS5xYSIsIm5vbWJyZXMiOiJBZG1pbiBSb2JvdCBGcmFtZXdvcmsiLCJyb2xJZCI6MSwic3VjdXJzYWxJZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzgxOTkxOTkyLCJleHAiOjE3ODE5OTI4OTJ9.OyfqX2mFSYAVTxGN5w4CSFiUjmE0Ht1MWA_fA5Mxv7s'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3002/api/v1/pacientes status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'self';base-uri 'self';font-src 'self' https: data:;form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';img-src 'self' data:;object-src 'none';script-src 'self';script-src-attr 'none';style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline';upgrade-insecure-requests", 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy': 'cross-origin', 'Origin-Agent-Cluster': '?1', 'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-DNS-Prefetch-Control': 'off', 'X-Download-Options': 'noopen', 'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY', 'X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies': 'none', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Vary': 'Origin', 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials': 'true', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '6267', 'ETag': 'W/"187b-MiLt556oqKeshddmTm4LaIwGFV8"', 'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 21:46:32 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":1,"nombre":"Milo","edad":"3 anos","sexo":"Macho","especie":"Canino","raza":"Beagle","peso":"12 kg","castrado":true,"foto":"https://picsum.photos/seed/milo/600/400","fechaNacimiento":"2022-01-10T00:00:00.000Z","fechaIngreso":"2025-01-12T00:00:00.000Z","estado":"ACTIVO","clienteId":1,"sedeId":1,"historiaClinicaId":1001,"alimentoPrincipal":"Concentrado premium para razas medianas","cliente":{"id":1,"nombres":"Camila Rodriguez","email":"camila.rodriguez@test.com","celular":"3001112233","telefonoAlterno":"6015550101","direccion":"Cra 45 #12-89","ciudad":"Bogota","documento":"CC10203040","cumpleanos":"1992-05-14T00:00:00.000Z","observaciones":"Prefiere contacto por WhatsApp en horario de la kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Con token válido se esperaba 200/404 (no 401/403), obtuvo ${resp.status_code}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Con un token válido, el gateway proxía la petición al microservicio.

suite.doc: Suite de pruebas para el módulo de Autenticación del API Gateway. Cubre login exitoso, validación de token JWT, rechazo por credenciales inválidas y protección de rutas privadas.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: Inicialización global de la suite de pruebas CliniCore. Realiza login UNA sola vez y crea la sesión HTTP compartida para evitar múltiples llamadas a /auth/login que dispararían el rate limiter del Gateway (20 req/min).
